mano_cua.result_summary: 发现两个 bug：1) 页面滚动后 math-field 在视口顶部时，菜单按钮第一次点击无响应（触发 scroll into view），需要点击两次才能弹出菜单。2) 菜单打开后 Escape 键不关闭菜单，而是改变了 math-field 模式。正常位置下菜单弹出和选项显示均正常，不会自动触发子菜单。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Two bugs found: 1) When page scrolled and math-field at top edge, first menu button click triggers scroll-into-view instead of opening menu, requiring two clicks. 2) Escape key doesn't close menu but changes math-field mode. Normal position menu behavior works correctly.
